overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring towering neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and wet streets reflecting vibrant advertisements. The footage displays high-fidelity game engine graphics with ray-traced lighting and atmospheric rain effects.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with an upward view of towering neon-lit skyscrapers in a futuristic city at night. Heavy rain creates a hazy atmosphere as the camera tilts down from the digital billboards to reveal a wet intersection with reflective asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

silver sedan and blue truck pass by on the multi-lane street

silver sedan passing by on the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a concrete overpass into a sheltered walkway, transitioning from the open intersection. Vehicles including a red sports car and silver sedan pass by on the wet street as the camera continues forward under the transit structure.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass, the scene opens to the rain-soaked sidewalk lined with utility poles featuring green holographic displays. The camera walks past modern glass buildings and bright street lights while vehicles pass in the background.

slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a commercial district with large vertical digital billboards lining the right side of the street. A yellow taxi passes by on the wet road as the camera continues walking past neon signage and commercial building entrances in the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis, moving from the towering heights of the skyline down into the dense commercial heart of the city. It begins with an upward gaze at neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards before tilting down to reveal a wet, reflective intersection under a heavy downpour. As the camera moves forward, the open intersection transitions into the sheltered gloom of a concrete overpass, where a red sports car and silver sedan glide past on the slick asphalt. The scene then opens back into the rain as the camera exits the transit structure, passing utility poles with green holographic displays and modern glass buildings. Finally, the path leads into a vibrant commercial district, moving past large vertical billboards and neon signage as a yellow taxi passes by on the shimmering road.
